claim: The naive route 'prove KL-SDPI from a uniform local chi-square bound under all external fields' is blocked: sampled external fields have local chi-square contraction above the target 2/w.
claim_boundary: This does not disprove the Talagrand shell inequality. It only blocks a too-strong global SDPI/spectral-independence route.
next_route: Use a maximum principle: eta can exceed the target only in low-ratio regions; prove no critical/high-ratio violation via KKT uniqueness/barrier.
